comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH (projen discipline): edit THIS file, run `node poteau/bin/poteau-gen.mjs`, never hand-edit generated outputs. Generated files carry @generated markers and a checksum; the gen tool refuses to overwrite drifted files without --force (drift = hand-edit = layer leakage).

failure_posture.comment: Two hook classes with OPPOSITE failure postures, both deliberate. SAFETY FENCES (loa house pattern) fail-open: a jq crash must not deny-of-service the agent. CUSTODY GATES fail-closed: a gate bypassable by inducing a crash is not a gate. Break-glass exists, is env-gated, and is the loudest signal in the system.
